pickup.name: Stabilizing Salt
pickup.effect: Prevents alchemical instability during item combination

encounters.trigger: Corpse drops a rusted key to the surgery room

pickup.name: Concentrated Catalyst
pickup.effect: Increases explosive potency of alchemical mixtures

encounters.trigger: Shattered mirror reveals a hidden passage to the vault

pickup.name: Ancient Transmuter Manual
pickup.effect: Provides the blueprint for the final cure

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Abomination releases the lockdown on the boss chamber

boss.name: The Alchemist's Shadow
boss.weakness: Combination of Stabilizing Salt, Concentrated Catalyst, and Ancient Transmuter Manual

level.objective: Synthesize the Prime Cure before the laboratory collapses

level.setting: Abandoned Catacombs beneath an ancient, decaying cathedral

pickup.name: Frost Catalyst
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes enemy mobility

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Lurker unlocks the sealed gate to the Altar of Ash.

pickup.name: Soul Ember
pickup.effect: Boosts pyromancy damage and acts as a beacon for the final seal

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker reveals the hidden staircase to the Cathedral Vault.

pickup.name: Crystal Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the inner Sanctum where the Void Devourer resides

encounters.trigger: Obtaining the Crystal Key triggers the final chamber door to open.

boss.name: Void Devourer
boss.victory_condition: Seal the void fissure using the Soul Ember

level.objective: Escape the Abyssal Catacombs before the rising tides of shadow consume the player.

pickup.name: Luminous Amulet
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden spectral runes

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Acolyte drops the iron key to the Inner Echoing Corridor.

pickup.name: Cursed Bell
pickup.effect: Emits a frequency that stuns incorporeal entities

encounters.trigger: The Stalker disintegrates, triggering the release of the massive Ritual Chamber seal.

pickup.name: Sacred Oil
pickup.effect: Extremely flammable coating for blades

encounters.trigger: Using the bell disrupts the Martyr, forcing it to collapse the altar and expose the path to the Abyssal Void.

boss.name: Abyssal Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Slay the Leviathan to cleanse the monastery.

level.objective: Escape the Forgotten Sanctum by defeating the Abyssal Leviathan.

level.setting: A desolate, fog-choked forest where time has lost its meaning.

pickup.name: Holy Oil
pickup.effect: Coats arrows to ignite undead enemies

encounters.trigger: Opening the ghoul's charred remains reveals the rusty gate key needed to proceed.

pickup.name: Blessed Sigil
pickup.effect: Repels ethereal spirits on contact

encounters.trigger: Destroying the scarecrow releases a spectral beacon that illuminates the path to the cemetery.

pickup.name: Sunstone Amulet
pickup.effect: Emits searing light capable of blinding the Void Stalker

encounters.trigger: Purifying the wraith tears the veil between worlds, summoning the forest's final guardian.

boss.name: Void Stalker
boss.victory_condition: Seal the forest rift using the Sunstone Amulet

level.objective: Escape the Whispering Forest before the Shadow consumes your soul.
level.reward: The Ranger is granted safe passage back to the civilized world and immunity to future shadows.

level.setting: A decaying, subterranean crypt filled with restless spirits.

pickup.name: Shadow Essence
pickup.effect: Empowers necromantic spells to deal double damage.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentry causes its remains to dissolve into a key that unlocks the Archives.

pickup.name: Silver-Bound Tome
pickup.effect: Reveals arcane vulnerabilities in unholy entities.

encounters.trigger: The Wraith's defeat grants a resonance that crumbles the wall leading to the Ritual Chamber.

pickup.name: Sun-Drenched Amulet
pickup.effect: Projects a holy light that suppresses shadow-based defenses.

encounters.trigger: The servant's final cry shatters the main gate leading to the Inner Sanctum where the Warden waits.

boss.name: Grave Warden
boss.victory_condition: Utilize the Sun-Drenched Amulet to destroy the Warden's impenetrable shadow armor.

level.objective: Escape the Soul-Catcher Crypt by defeating the Grave Warden.
level.reward: The Necromancer's Cloak of Eternal Night.

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Melts organic matter

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Husk triggers the security lockdown, trapping the player in the processing room.

pickup.name: Stolen Fuse
pickup.effect: Activates the heavy containment blast door

encounters.trigger: Activating the fuse opens the path to the Cryogenic Vault.

pickup.name: Prototype Adrenaline Shot
pickup.effect: Temporary invulnerability

encounters.trigger: Death of the Butcher shatters the main cryo-chamber, awakening the Boss.

boss.name: Primordial Gore-God
boss.victory_condition: Use the Prototype Adrenaline Shot to survive the death-scream and strike the exposed heart.

level.objective: Escape the Abattoir and slay the Primordial Gore-God.

pickup.name: Heavy Iron Key
pickup.effect: Opens the main gate of the inner sanctum

encounters.trigger: Defeating the shade unlocks the gate leading to the Reflecting Pool

pickup.name: Blessed Oil
pickup.effect: Coats the weapon to increase damage against spirits

encounters.trigger: The dying lurker shatters the water, revealing the hidden stairs to the Altar

pickup.name: Golden Bell
pickup.effect: Produces a resonant frequency that summons the Silent Guardian

encounters.trigger: Ringing the Golden Bell at the Altar forces the boss to materialize

boss.name: The Silent Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Ring the Golden Bell during the boss fight to render the guardian vulnerable

level.objective: Cleanse the Silent Crypt and defeat the Silent Guardian

level.setting: A dilapidated, neon-lit carnival under a blood moon.

encounters.hazard: Floor spikes that look like sharpened candy canes

pickup.name: Mirror Shard
pickup.effect: Allows the player to reflect light beams

encounters.trigger: Defeating the goblin shatters the entryway, revealing the dark path to the Hall of Echoes.

encounters.hazard: Spinning carousel of doom that creates dizzying illusions

pickup.name: Gilded Whistle
pickup.effect: Produces a sound that shatters magical defenses

encounters.trigger: After the Shadow Jester is defeated, the Gilded Whistle acts as a key to silence the carnival music, opening the path to the Big Top.

encounters.hazard: Falling spotlights that crush the floor

pickup.name: Golden Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the main containment mirror in the center of the arena

encounters.trigger: The Puppet Master vanishes, dropping the Golden Key, which activates the final boss ritual.

boss.name: The Grand Illusionist
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Golden Key into the mirror frame to seal the boss away.

level.objective: Escape the Haunted Carnival of Mirrors by sealing the demon within the main display.
level.reward: The carnival vanishes, leaving behind a permanent charm of invisibility.

pickup.name: Lubricant Canister
pickup.effect: Increases weapon fire rate by coating the gears

encounters.trigger: Breaking the boiler valve initiates a pressure alert, opening the ventilation shaft.

pickup.name: Arc Capacitor
pickup.effect: Electrifies projectiles, dealing bonus shock damage

encounters.trigger: Sabotaging the sentry circuits triggers a lockdown override leading to the core chamber.

pickup.name: Master Valve Handle
pickup.effect: Allows control over high-pressure valves

encounters.trigger: Defeating the golem causes the core to expose the Engine Overlord for a final confrontation.

boss.name: Engine Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Valve Handle to vent pressure and force a shutdown.

level.objective: Stabilize the collapsing main steam engine at the center of the Great Gear Foundry.
level.reward: The Golden Gear Cog and total control of the city power grid

pickup.name: Brass Valve Key
pickup.effect: Stabilizes pressure systems

encounters.trigger: Turning the valve unlocks the Gear Corridor gate.

pickup.name: Harmonic Resonator
pickup.effect: Disrupts mechanical frequencies

encounters.trigger: The resonator pulse clears the path to the Clockwork Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Rotating saw blades on the floor

pickup.name: Chrono-Focus Lens
pickup.effect: Amplifies precision strikes on temporal cores

encounters.trigger: The lens aligns the central mechanism to reveal the boss arena.

boss.name: The Grand Timekeeper
boss.victory_condition: Overload the central furnace during the temporal stall.

level.objective: Infiltrate the Brass Clockwork Spire and stabilize the central reactor core.

level.setting: The Celestial Chrono-City, a floating metropolis built inside a giant clock.

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Wire
pickup.effect: Used to overload mechanical circuitry

encounters.trigger: Defeating the pigeon triggers the pressure valve to open the entrance to the Ventilation Shaft.

pickup.name: Bottled Lightning
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants electrical damage to acidic flasks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the mouse clears the path to the Clock Tower Core.

pickup.name: The Master Cuckoo Cog
pickup.effect: A precision component required to halt the boss

encounters.trigger: Defeating the steam golem triggers the emergence of the Clockwork Baron.

boss.name: The Clockwork Baron
boss.victory_condition: Insert The Master Cuckoo Cog into his main spring.

level.objective: Retrieve the Golden Gear of Infinite Steam from the Celestial Chrono-City.
level.reward: The Golden Gear of Infinite Steam and a perpetual steam-powered monocle.

level.setting: The decaying, smog-filled industrial underbelly of the Brass Citadel

encounters.hazard: High-pressure steam vents that burn the player

pickup.name: Oil Flask
pickup.effect: Reduces mechanical friction and slows down fast-moving machinery

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry releases a steam valve that clears the smog, revealing the entrance to the Gear Vault.

enemy.name: Brass Automaton
enemy.weakness: The lubricating effect of the Oil Flask to seize its joints

pickup.name: Arcane Capacitor
pickup.effect: Stores and conducts electricity to overload complex circuitry

encounters.trigger: Destroying the automaton shorts the vault's circuit board, forcing the Reactor Core containment seal to open.

enemy.name: Steam Sentinel
enemy.weakness: The high-voltage surge from the Arcane Capacitor

encounters.hazard: Exposed live wires across the floor

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Used to disengage the security protocols of the Chronos Engine

encounters.trigger: Overloading the sentinel creates a massive electrical discharge that triggers the main power shutdown and summons Foreman Silas.

boss.name: Foreman Silas
boss.weakness: The Master Override Key forces the engine to eject Silas's armor plating
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Override Key to force the engine to self-destruct

level.objective: Infiltrate the Brass Citadel and neutralize the Chronos Engine before the city implodes.

pickup.name: Conductive Oil
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity of mechanical targets

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton opens the bulkhead to the lower Forge Floor

pickup.name: Valve Handle
pickup.effect: Allows manual manipulation of high-pressure steam pipes

encounters.trigger: Destroying the spider triggers the release of the emergency elevator

pickup.name: Master Gear Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the main pressure piston controller

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the sentinel triggers the main gate to the boss chamber

level.objective: Disable the central smog-producing boiler to clear the sky above the city
level.reward: The Stormcaller's Core, granting permanent electrical surge abilities

pickup.name: Brass Gear
pickup.effect: Provides mechanical resistance for repairs.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry releases a locking mechanism on the rusted gate to the Factory Floor.

pickup.name: Time-Distortion Lens
pickup.effect: Allows the player to perceive enemy movement in slow motion.

encounters.trigger: The automaton's collapse causes a steam pressure overload that blows open the path to the Clock Tower Belfry.

pickup.name: Chrono-Crank
pickup.effect: A master key designed to rewind the central clockwork mechanism.

encounters.trigger: The foreman falls and drops the seal key, opening the main entrance to the Clock Core.

boss.name: The Eternal Pendulum
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Chrono-Crank into the base of the pendulum to stabilize the timeline.

level.objective: Restore the shattered Great Clock to end the timeless decay consuming the city of Gears-End.

pickup.name: Copper Cog
pickup.effect: Enhances electrical conductivity

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the Copper Cog triggers the activation of the lift mechanism leading to the Forge.

encounters.hazard: Molten iron slurry on the floor

pickup.name: Pressure Valve
pickup.effect: Capable of inducing rapid system overload

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Pressure Valve forces open the bulkhead to the Sanctum.

pickup.name: Master Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the central core of the Chronos-Revenant

encounters.trigger: Collecting the Master Key unlocks the heavy blast doors to the Boss arena.

boss.name: Chronos-Revenant
boss.weakness: Master Key to jam the core
boss.victory_condition: Destroy the central gear assembly within the Revenant chest cavity.

level.objective: Escape the sunken brass catacombs of Cog-Haven before the steam pressure destroys the structural integrity of the city.

level.setting: A floating brass conservatory hovering over a sea of clouds

pickup.name: Brass Gear
pickup.effect: Restores 20 health and provides a friction-heavy component

encounters.trigger: Defeating the spider unlocks the passage to the Maintenance Shaft.

pickup.name: Cooling Liquid
pickup.effect: Increases weapon damage by 5 and acts as a coolant

encounters.trigger: Repairing the shaft lever opens the door to the Main Engine Room.

pickup.name: Chrono-Key
pickup.effect: Used to access the inner sanctum

encounters.trigger: Using the Chrono-Key on the master terminal triggers the Boss fight.

boss.name: The Grand Clockmaker
boss.victory_condition: Freeze the internal gears using the Chrono-Key

level.objective: Restore the celestial Steam Core to bring tranquility to the floating brass conservatory.
